  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Temporary bracing was removed prematurely before decking or permanent lateral stability elements were fully secured.",
    "Premature removal of bracing creates an immediate structural collapse hazard and violates safety standards."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately reinstall temporary bracing to stabilize the columns and beams.",
    "Evacuate the immediate area under and around the unsupported structure until bracing is secured.",
    "Do not proceed with decking or loading until the structure is properly plumbed, aligned, and temporarily or permanently stabilized."
  ],
  "rationale": "Removing temporary bracing before the structure has achieved permanent stability through decking, diaphragms, or permanent bracing is a critical safety violation under OSHA and AISC standards. The erection is considered rough-complete but is highly unstable and must be failed and remediated immediately.",
  "references": [
    "AISC 303 (Code of Standard Practice for Steel Buildings and Bridges, Section 7)",
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart R (Steel Erection, 1926.754 - Structural steel assembly)"
  ]
}
